string 2:
Ah, you're here! King Drasil, this is the human I was telling
you about!
This one's as strong as they come! Let's ask for their help!

So it was you that they were talking about after all... I'd
surmised as much.

Still, even though we're new to this world, I never thought we'd
be the ones asking for help.
{next}"Help"?
{next}What do you mean by "this world"?
{next}And exactly who are you, again?

Yes. it seemed this world was in trouble, so I brought my
children with me to assist.

However, they're not familiar with this new world, and have
gotten themselves lost.

This Digital World, known as "Iliad." It's not our original
home.

With its host, Homeros, in such a state... I'd like to take
action before things get truly out of hand.

Although I'm asking for your help, I'd appreciate you not
worrying too much about the details.

I'm King Drasil, a host from another world. This form you
see is merely temporary.

Although I'm asking for your help, please don't pry for any
further details.

Please find my lost children. Have my main squad gather at
the rendezvous point.
{next}Your main squad?
{next}The rendezvous point?
{next}Can't you do it yourself?
That's us! We're called "the Royal Knights"!

We're the guardians of the world. Amazing, huh? But we're
a bit scattered at the moment.

Yes. That location is quite convenient for many things.
I don't have time to explain in detail.

In short, it's a nexus of various destinies, so it's handy for
reconciling paradoxes.

Please find all of the Royal Knights and tell them to meet 
at the appointed spot.

I'd attend to it myself, but I'm unable to leave this spot for 
various reasons.

Please find all of the Royal Knights and tell them to meet 
at the appointed spot.

Once the Royal Knights come together, we can easily save
this world.

I dunno about "easily"... but for sure we'd be helpful!
Please, help us find our allies!
{next}Okay. I'll help you.
{end}Sorry. I'm busy.

By the way, we gave the Digimon we sent the
ability to turn human.

You can't always tell, though. Now, head to the rendezvous
point with Agumon and the others.

I understand. I don't want to impose on you, so please
come again if you're able.

I wanna thank you for that time you helped me. And
thank you for this time, too!

Okay, let's get out of here. King Drasil's connected the exit to 
the meeting spot for us!

We're here. Tell our allies that this is the appointed spot 
where we're supposed to meet.

We'll wait here for everyone to arrive just so we don't miss
each other.
{next}I've got this!
{next}Do you have any hints for me?
{next}The rendezvous point is huge...

You're really doing us a solid! We're lucky to have met
someone like you in this world!

Yeah, it was unfortunate that we got split up like this, but
it's not all bad.

My fellow Royal Knights might be enjoying themselves even
more than expected.

If we had any hints, we would've been able to find everyone
on our own already.

I guess if you find any stray Digimon, ask if they're a
member of the Royal Knights!

I'm sure they'll announce themselves once you make it clear
you know the Royal Knights.

Yes, it's big enough for everyone to gather, but I wonder
why it was chosen, specifically.

Hey, what did King Drasil mean by this place is unstable and
that it's near the end?

I'm sure we'll be fine if we do as the boss says. We just
need to find our allies.

The Royal Knights can be rather... unique at times, so they
tend to stand out in a crowd.

Sorry I don't have more info, but can you see if there are
any Digimon who stand out?

If you find any of our allies, please tell them to meet us
here. Thanks!

Here are some supplies for you! I hope they come in handy on
your journey!
One of our members has returned to us! Thank you!
I'm bored waiting around. Hey, you wanna play cards?
Sure.
{end}No, thanks.
Great! I was hoping you'd say that!

One of our members has returned to us. Keep up the good
work!

I learned a card game after coming here.
Wanna play a game?!
Sure.
{end}No, thanks.
You just watch... I'm gonna mop the floor with you!

The Royal Knights are undoubtedly a skilled bunch, but they
lack cohesion as a unit.

Basically, they're self-centered, so they prioritize their
own feelings over my orders.

That's not always a bad thing, but it isn't a good trait to
have during an emergency.
{next}It must be tough being a leader.
{next}How do you usually handle it?
{next}I wanna join your squad.
Are you complimenting me? Thanks.

It can be difficult simply giving orders all the time. I
want to solve my own problems.

I usually leave them be. Our world is a peaceful one, and
they're good kids, to boot.

I give the orders, but they act on their own. It can lead to
misunderstandings, though.
You're not a Digimon.

Also, the Royal Knights are all quite powerful on their own,
even for Digimon.

So please give up on joining the squad and just help me
summon them. Thanks.

No, forget I said anything. Now, good luck with summoning
the Royal Knights.

I can confirm that all of the Royal Knights have returned. 
Thank you. Here's your reward.

You've reunited the Royal Knights! I'm positive they can
help save this world.
